checkResults.title: GET /v1/models returns an OpenAI-compatible list payload
checkResults.details: Model catalog contract matches the OpenAI list shape expected by OpenRouter.

checkResults.title: POST /v1/chat/completions rejects requests without a renter API key
checkResults.details: Auth guard correctly rejects anonymous requests with an OpenAI-style authentication error.

checkResults.title: POST /v1/chat/completions rejects renters without enough balance
checkResults.details: Billing guard correctly returns a 402 billing error before proxying the request.

checkResults.title: POST /v1/chat/completions proxies a healthy completion response
checkResults.details: Healthy OpenRouter-style completion requests reach the provider proxy and return a standard chat completion payload.

checkResults.title: Streaming responses preserve SSE headers and emit a DONE terminator
checkResults.details: Healthy streaming requests keep the SSE content type and terminate cleanly with [DONE].

checkResults.title: Assistant tool_calls and tool result messages survive the proxy transform
checkResults.details: Conversation history with tool calls and tool outputs is preserved when the request is proxied.

checkResults.title: Tool definitions and tool_choice are forwarded to the provider
checkResults.details: Tool definitions reach the provider proxy intact.

checkResults.title: Mid-stream provider failures are surfaced cleanly to QA
checkResults.details: The harness observed a cleanly surfaced mid-stream failure mode.
evidence: body_prefix={"error":{"message":"Provider failover exhausted after initial error: connection
